title: astragalus canoflavus
intro: Astragalus canoflavus, also known as Huang Qi, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries to boost the immune system and improve overall health, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus canoflavus include reducing fatigue and stress, improving respiratory health, and enhancing the body's natural defense against infections and diseases. Astragalus canoflavus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
